query:
SELECT 
  p.name,
  p.sector,
  p.priority,
  p.state,
  p.blScore,
  COUNT(c.id) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.trustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as send_ready_contacts,
  p.createdAt
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.reportId = p.id
WHERE p.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sector, p.priority, p.state, p.blScore, p.createdAt
ORDER BY p.blScore DESC, p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 25;
